case_title: ISRAEL ZAMBRANO ET AL VS. GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS ISRAEL ZAMBRANO ARE IRENE ZAMBRANO ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED VY JEFF BURTON, GENERAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.
